name: NetDetect
description: A centralized campus network monitoring platform that provides real-time visibility into network health, helping administrators detect issues quickly and minimize downtime.

name: Everyshelf
description: An inventory management system that streamlines stock tracking, inventory updates, and reporting, helping businesses reduce errors and improve operational efficiency.

name: QR Wise Clinics
description: A comprehensive clinic management platform that simplifies appointment scheduling, patient records, billing, and payments to improve healthcare operations and patient experience.

name: Bola
description: A browser-based physics puzzle game where players guide a ball through obstacle-filled levels using momentum, gravity, tilt, and rebound mechanics. Built around satisfying rolling and bouncing physics.

productBrief.tagline: A physics rolling puzzle where players nudge, tilt, and time momentum through curved paths, ramps, and obstacles.
productBrief.pitch: A physics rolling puzzle where players nudge, tilt, and time momentum through curved paths, ramps, and obstacles.
productBrief.coreGameplayHook: A physics rolling puzzle where players nudge, tilt, and time momentum through curved paths, ramps, and obstacles.
productBrief.audience: Casual and puzzle-game players who enjoy tactile, playful, satisfying gameplay.
productBrief.successCriteria: Visitors immediately understand the physics ball gameplay, experience the game's movement through page animations, and click Play Now.

name: QR Wise Clinics Landing Page
description: A modern marketing website for QR Wise Clinics that showcases its clinic management platform, highlights key features, and drives healthcare providers to request demos and get started.
